response.justification: The candidate brings over 16 years of diverse software engineering experience, including recent and highly relevant work in AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes). Their entrepreneurial background as a founder, coupled with extensive contributions to workshops and open-source projects, strongly aligns with the engineering leadership and 'inspiring others' aspects of this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Extensive experience (16+ years) across diverse tech stacks and system types.
Recent and direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies.
Strong engineering leadership, mentorship, and communication skills demonstrated through founder role, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: No explicit Master's or PhD in an AI-related field.
While entrepreneurial, less direct evidence of driving AI strategy at a Director-level within a very large, established enterprise context.
The resume includes a name discrepancy (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Szabo Bogdan for contact/links).
